text:
The island humpback whale.

This wasn't just any humpback whale. It was the most beautiful white whale the world had ever seen. It lived in crystal-clear waters off the coast of the Hawaiian islands.

One sunny summer day... well... spring actually, it started drifting into a quiet cove. As it surfed around, it met a group of adorable Hawaiian humpback finches. They'd been feeding on small fish swimming alongside their favorite podded starfish.

The finches got stuck on the whales' gigantic whiskers. They chattered and swooned over the whale's beauty, which just made the whale more curious. One cheeky finch was bold enough to try a nibble. It tasted just like the finches back home.

The whale gave it a playful nudge with its tail fin, and they went on their way.

Two days later, the finches were lamenting.

"What happened to... oh wow! That whale!" they exclaimed in un
